title: Best round
note: For each event, shows the rounds with the best sum of the top 3 results. For blind events the single is used, for other events the average is used.
noteZh: 每个项目中 top 3 成绩之和最低的轮次。盲拧用单次，其他用平均。

sections.title: 6x6x6 Cube
rows: [Asia Konvittayayotin (เอเชีย กรวิทยโยธิน)](https://www.worldcubeassociation.org/persons/2009KONV01)
